target: 3. Where is the Detective?
...I don't see anyone who looks like a detective.
Um, Totsumura-san. Weren't the backup detectives from the mainland supposed to come on that ferry?
That's what was supposed to happen.
Maybe... Since they couldn't find Tetsu-san, they might have gone to town first.
We came to the port first, but without Totsumura-san here, we wouldn't know who the detectives are...
Yeah... I had no idea.
I-I know it was my fault for being late.
But it couldn't be helped. I had an errand that required me to go back to the station once...
Well, what's done is done. What we need to think about now is where the backup detectives went.
Can't you contact them somehow?
They're not answering their cell phones. We'd better go look for them ourselves.
Then... Let's head back to town for now.
No one who looks like a detective. I thought they might be asking around, but...
I asked the people in the shopping district, but no one has seen anyone like that.
In that case... the remaining possibility is where Totsumura-san went to check――
He~y, Shinpei-kun, Mio-chan! So this is where you were!
Ah, Tetsu-san. How was the station? Were the detectives there?
No, they weren't. There was no sign of anyone visiting either.
So the theory that they passed by Totsumura-san and went to the station is gone. Then where in the world...
Mio.
Ah, Tokiko.
What an unusual combination. Did something happen?
Ah, yeah… um…
(I understand how Mio feels.)
(It's hard to put into words right away how to explain everything up to this point...)
Hey, Shin-chan... Shouldn't we probably tell Tokiko too?
It might be dangerous if she doesn't know anything...
...Maybe so.
Um, if it's something you can't tell me, you don't have to force yourselves to...
No, it's not like that. It's just a bit of an unbelievable story...
Plus... even we don't really understand the details...
If you're okay with that, I'll try explaining...
Yes, please.
That story just now... I can believe it, right?
Yeah... It might be hard to believe, but...
I still don't really feel it myself, but... But...
Mio…
Also... those Shadow things... I don't think there's just one or two of them.
Hah!? I haven't heard anything about that, Shinpei-kun!
You said it yourself, didn't you, Totsumura-san? That the Shadow Sickness has been passed down on this island since a long time ago.
If that's the case, there's a possibility that there are other Shadows...
(In fact, Shiori-chan has already been turned into a Shadow...)
(Right before I died... I saw the real Totsumura-san get killed by Shadow Mio, and then a Shadow Totsumura-san was born.)
(If the other Shadows are also killing people and increasing their numbers like that...)
(And if they've been doing it for a long time...)
That's ridiculous...! If the Shadows treat the hero of justice as their enemy, I'll be targeted left and right!?
A-Anyway, we have to find the backup detectives!
...No, we need even more backup now!! I'm going back to the station to contact them!!
Mio, let's go!
Y-yeah!
Tokiko, be careful!
Yeah, you too, Mio...
